description: Trigger accuracy evals for the monte-carlo-monitoring-advisor skill. Each case specifies whether the skill SHOULD or SHOULD NOT be triggered by the given prompt.

cases.prompt: What should I monitor in my Snowflake warehouse? I'm not sure where to start.
cases.rationale: Broad monitoring guidance request -- core skill use case

cases.prompt: Where are my coverage gaps? I want to see which critical tables don't have monitors.
cases.rationale: Directly asks about coverage gaps -- primary activation trigger

cases.prompt: Show me my use cases and which ones are protected by monitors.
cases.rationale: Use-case analysis with coverage mapping -- explicit trigger phrase

cases.prompt: I want to understand what's monitored vs. not in our data warehouse.
cases.rationale: Monitored vs. unmonitored analysis -- listed in activation triggers

cases.prompt: We have tables with anomalies but no monitors. Can you help me find and prioritize them?
cases.rationale: Unmonitored tables with anomalies -- importance-based prioritization

cases.prompt: Can you explore our data estate and tell me what needs monitoring the most?
cases.rationale: Data estate exploration with monitoring recommendations

cases.prompt: Which of our tables are most critical and least monitored?
cases.rationale: Criticality vs. coverage gap analysis

cases.prompt: We just onboarded Monte Carlo. Help me figure out a monitoring strategy for our warehouse.
cases.rationale: New customer wanting monitoring strategy -- coverage analysis use case

cases.prompt: How's our data coverage looking? Are there any high-importance tables without monitors?
cases.rationale: Data coverage assessment -- directly matches activation triggers

cases.prompt: I want to do a use-case analysis to see which business processes depend on which tables and whether they're covered.
cases.rationale: Use-case criticality analysis -- explicit trigger keyword

cases.prompt: Can you show me a breakdown of monitored vs. unmonitored tables grouped by schema?
cases.rationale: Coverage breakdown by schema -- warehouse discovery + gap analysis

cases.prompt: We're getting too many alerts on low-priority tables and missing issues on critical ones. Help me reprioritize.
cases.rationale: Coverage mismatch -- needs use-case criticality reassessment

cases.prompt: What tables in our analytics schema have the most downstream dependencies but no monitors?
cases.rationale: Importance-based gap detection using lineage context

cases.prompt: Run a monitoring coverage assessment across our BigQuery datasets.
cases.rationale: Explicit coverage assessment request for a specific warehouse

cases.prompt: I want to see which use cases are at risk because of missing monitors.
cases.rationale: Use-case risk analysis tied to coverage gaps

cases.prompt: Help me set up monitoring for my AI agents — I want to track latency and token usage.
cases.rationale: AI agent monitoring request -- agent monitor creation is part of this skill

cases.prompt: Which of our AI agents have the worst latency? I want to create alerts for them.
cases.rationale: Agent observability with monitor creation intent

cases.prompt: I want to monitor my agent's response quality and catch runaway tool call loops.
cases.rationale: Agent evaluation and trajectory monitoring

cases.prompt: Create a freshness monitor on the orders table with a 2-hour threshold.
cases.rationale: Direct data monitor creation -- now handled by this unified skill

cases.prompt: Set up a custom SQL rule monitor that checks for NULL values in the revenue column of daily_metrics.
cases.rationale: Specific data monitor creation -- now handled by this unified skill

cases.prompt: Monitor my AI agent for excessive tool calls and set up an alert if it loops more than 5 times.
cases.rationale: Agent trajectory monitor creation -- agent monitoring is part of this skill

cases.prompt: Add a null rate monitor on the email and user_id columns of the users table.
cases.rationale: Direct metric monitor creation for specific fields

cases.prompt: Set up a validation rule to ensure order status is always in the allowed set.
cases.rationale: Data validation monitor creation

cases.prompt: Compare row counts between our staging and production orders tables.
cases.rationale: Comparison monitor creation between two tables

cases.prompt: I want to evaluate my chat agent's answer relevance and alert if it drops below a threshold.
cases.rationale: Agent evaluation monitor creation with quality scoring

cases.prompt: We got a freshness alert on raw_events. What happened and what's downstream?
cases.rationale: Active alert triage -- use prevent skill's Workflow 3

cases.prompt: I'm modifying the stg_payments dbt model to change a join. What's the blast radius?
cases.rationale: Impact assessment before code change -- use prevent skill

cases.prompt: How do I delete the volume monitor I set up on dim_customers?
cases.rationale: Editing/deleting an existing monitor -- not coverage analysis or creation

cases.prompt: Can you help me push metadata from our Databricks warehouse to Monte Carlo?
cases.rationale: Push ingestion -- use push-ingestion skill

cases.prompt: Help me write a Python script to parse Airflow logs.
cases.rationale: General scripting -- unrelated to monitoring

cases.prompt: How do I configure Slack notifications for Monte Carlo incidents?
cases.rationale: Notification setup -- not monitoring coverage or creation

cases.prompt: Can you update the threshold on my existing row count monitor for the users table?
cases.rationale: Modifying an existing monitor -- not creation or coverage analysis

cases.prompt: I need to add a new column to the orders model in models/marts/orders.sql.
cases.rationale: dbt model edit -- use prevent skill for impact assessment
